subcodes.first_line: We make mention of thy brother, that he may rejoice in the remembrance of his Lord and be numbered among those who have cast away that which the people possess and taken that which they were commanded [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و نذکر اخاک لیفرح بذکر ربه و یکون من الذین نبذوا ما عند القوم و اخذوا ما امروا
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @obedience to; authority of the Manifestations of God, @personal instructions
